ui.route.title: Route Select
ui.route.subtitle: Choose the next move
ui.encounter.scene_prompt:
[b]%s[/b]
%s

Pick one action card and one shout. Teammates will read the signal, then decide whether to follow, split, loot, or run.
ui.encounter.no_result:
No result yet.
Choose a card, then resolve the encounter.
ui.squad.role_line:
[b]%s%s[/b]
Role %s
HP %d | Bag %d
Trust %d | Greed %d | Care %d
ui.route.member_summary_loyal: Usually follows the squad, but rare loot can still start conflict.
ui.route.member_summary_greedy: Very reactive to high reward nodes and may peel off for loot.
ui.route.member_summary_flexible: Flexible attitude. Often follows the flow of the run.
ui.route.attitude_neutral_reason: Can go, but will watch risk closely.
ui.route.attitude_cautious_reason: May hesitate or call for a safer path.
node.start.title: Rally Point
node.n1a.title: Abandoned Village
node.n1b.title: Broken Factory
node.n1c.title: Fuel Station
node.n2a.title: Signal Tower
node.n2b.title: Empty Market
node.n2c.title: Field Post
node.n3a.title: Suburb Clinic
node.n3b.title: Metro Gate
node.n3c.title: Repair Stop
node.n4a.title: Radar Site
node.n4b.title: Supply Yard
node.n4c.title: Checkpoint
node.n5a.title: Evac A
node.n5b.title: Evac B
node.desc.battle: High risk combat. Good for pressure and loot swings.
node.desc.search: Loot focused route. Higher reward also raises solo-play temptation.
node.desc.bond: Team relationship route. Can recover trust or trigger new conflict.
node.desc.story: Unclear outcome. Often changes the pace of later route choices.
node.desc.evac: Possible run exit. Teammates may disagree on leaving early.
node.desc.supply: Steadier stop for healing and resource reset.
node.desc.intel: Reveals route information and makes the next choice cleaner.
node.desc.default: Key node on the current route.
encounter.desc.battle: Hostiles are close enough that one bad signal can turn into a split fight.
encounter.desc.resource: There is loot or useful information here, which means greed has something to grab onto.
encounter.desc.evac: The exit is visible. Everyone is counting their bag and pretending they are not.
encounter.desc.bond: The team has a moment to argue, bargain, or repair the last mess.
encounter.desc.default: The situation is messy, readable enough to act, and unstable enough to go sideways.
card.attack_push.name: Strong Push
card.attack_push.summary: Break the front and ask others to follow.
card.suppress_fire.name: Suppress Fire
card.suppress_fire.summary: Lower immediate threat and stabilize the fight.
card.scramble_loot.name: Scramble Loot
card.scramble_loot.summary: Grab supplies while everyone is distracted.
card.steal_bag.name: Steal Bag
card.steal_bag.summary: Take goods from the richest teammate.
card.fallback.name: Fallback
card.fallback.summary: Step back and push toward evacuation.
card.rear_guard.name: Rear Guard
card.rear_guard.summary: Cover a teammate and keep the group readable.
shout.none.name: No Shout
shout.none.summary: Let the card speak for itself.
shout.follow.name: Follow me!
shout.follow.summary: Raises follow intent if trust is decent.
shout.retreat.name: Pull back!
shout.cover.name: I cover you.
shout.cover.summary: Raises trust if you play support or survival.
log.attack_push: The push had %d teammate(s) behind it.
log.suppress_fire: Suppressive fire bought a quieter turn.
log.scramble_loot: You grabbed supplies before the team settled the room.
log.fallback: You created distance and looked for a safer exit.
log.rear_guard: The team noticed you stayed back to cover them.
log.shout_follow: Your shout made the plan easier to read.
log.shout_cover: The cover call sounded believable this time.
log.shout_retreat: The retreat call lowered the immediate panic.
intent.steal_bag.label: Eyes on bags
intent.steal_bag.reason: your theft made looting feel allowed
intent.retreat.label: Pulling out
intent.retreat.reason: survival and carried loot beat teamwork
intent.solo_loot.label: Solo loot
intent.follow.label: Following
intent.hold.label: Holding
intent.attack.label: Freelance attack
